creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS --exclude=.svn /usr/ports/textproc/py-markdown-it-py/Makefile /usr/ports/wip/py-markdown-it-py/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/textproc/py-markdown-it-py/Makefile      2023-01-11 17:09:28.545174000 -0600
+++ /usr/ports/wip/py-markdown-it-py/Makefile   2023-03-11 18:13:29.614921000 -0600
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 PORTNAME=      markdown-it-py
-PORTVERSION=   2.1.0
+PORTVERSION=   2.2.0
 CATEGORIES=    textproc python
 MASTER_SITES=  PYPI
 PKGNAMEPREFIX= ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS --exclude=.svn /usr/ports/textproc/py-markdown-it-py/distinfo /usr/ports/wip/py-markdown-it-py/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/textproc/py-markdown-it-py/distinfo      2023-01-05 18:07:24.310015000 -0600
+++ /usr/ports/wip/py-markdown-it-py/distinfo   2023-03-11 18:12:15.471600000 -0600
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-TIMESTAMP = 1650228820
-SHA256 (markdown-it-py-2.1.0.tar.gz) = cf7e59fed14b5ae17c0006eff14a2d9a00ed5f3a846148153899a0224e2c07da
-SIZE (markdown-it-py-2.1.0.tar.gz) = 66227
+TIMESTAMP = 1678579893
+SHA256 (markdown-it-py-2.2.0.tar.gz) = 7c9a5e412688bc771c67432cbfebcdd686c93ce6484913dccf06cb5a0bea35a1
+SIZE (markdown-it-py-2.2.0.tar.gz) = 67120
